name: Proto-Japonic (family node)
notes: STRUCTURAL ANCESTRY NODE (not a modelled G2P target). Proto-Japonic is the reconstructed common ancestor of the Japonic family (Japanese and Ryukyuan). It exists here only so the ancestry / phylogenetic-distance metrics of the modern varieties that reference it have a node to resolve to; NO phonology is claimed or reconstructed and the minimal grapheme set is a placeholder (afa.json / trk.json stub pattern).

sources.author: Frellesvig, B.
sources.title: A History of the Japanese Language
sources.notes: Reference for Japonic reconstruction (structural node only).
